caption: A person with blond hair wearing a dark shirt and headphones is visible in a small video window on the left side of a screen. The rest of the display shows a sports video game interface featuring an aerial view of a football stadium filled with spectators. Text at the top indicates a game situation with "1st & Goal" and a game clock showing "0:07" then "0:06". A "PREVIOUS PLAY" menu is displayed in the center, listing "COVER 4 QUARTERS" and "PA DEEP OUTS". Below this, a play selection menu is open, with "SELECT A PLAY" written on the left and "COVER 4 QUARTERS" highlighted in multiple boxes. The screen also displays "COACH SUGGESTIONS", "FORMATION", "CONCEPT", "PLAY TYPE", "FAVORITES", and "RECENT PLAYS". As the sequence progresses, the person in the video window changes from a neutral expression to laughing with an open mouth, while the game clock counts down from "0:07" to "0:06".
